signals.headline: Bitcoin Surge After Geopolitical Shock | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Bitcoin Surge After Geopolitical Shock | NO | HIGH confidence**  
Bitcoin rose 1.65% to $71,937 on April 13, 2026, recovering from a plunge to $70,741 triggered by President Trump's order to blockade the Strait of Hormuz and collapsed US-Iran peace talks; by April 14, it reached $74,314[1][7][8]. signals.headline: Coinbase Conditional Trust Charter Approval | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Coinbase Conditional Trust Charter Approval | YES | MED confidence**  
Coinbase received conditional U.S. national trust charter approval around April 2, 2026, enabling federally regulated crypto custody and deeper institutional integration[2]. This regulatory milestone could boost crypto legitimacy and move prediction markets on U.S. policy shifts.
